UpgradeTitle: Take Your Business to Full Automation!
UpgradeInfo: Digitalize your weighing processes with Otonom Kantar Pro, reduce human error to zero:
Feature1: - Full Integration: Instant data sharing with SQL, ERP, SAP, IFS, and Accounting systems.
Feature2: - Autonomous Operation: AI-powered license plate recognition and auto-recording without an operator.
Feature3: - Official Processes: Your waybill is ready in UBL format as soon as weighing is finished.
Feature4: - Access Everywhere: Track the scale from your pocket with Cloud Web and Mobile apps.
Feature5: - GPS Integration: Inspect vehicle locations before and after the scale.
Feature6: - Premium Support: 24/7 technical support and latest software infrastructure.
RestoreSuccess: Data restored successfully. App will refresh.
ResetSuccess: All weighing data has been cleared.
ConfirmBackup: Do you want to backup current data?
ConfirmRestore: WARNING: Current data will be replaced by backup. Proceed?
ConfirmReset: WARNING: ALL DATA WILL BE DELETED! This cannot be undone. Are you sure?
DoubleOnClickHint: Double-click on an open weighing record to take the second weight. Press ESC to cancel.
